subject: Go 1.24 released: generics improvements and faster GC
body_preview: This week: the Go 1.24 release notes, a deep dive on profile-guided optimization, and a sync.Map rewrite worth reading.

subject: The Pragmatic Engineer: Surviving your first on-call rotation
body_preview: A field guide for junior engineers heading into their first on-call: runbooks, escalation paths, and staying calm under pressure.

subject: Postgres Weekly #573: Partitioning, indexes, and EXPLAIN tips
body_preview: Practical partitioning strategies, a BRIN vs B-tree comparison, and a query-planning walkthrough you can run today.

subject: WTA Trail News: 5 Cascade hikes peaking this month
body_preview: Larch season is coming. Conditions reports for Snow Lake, Rattlesnake Ledge, and three quieter alternates.

subject: Your REI Co-op member dividend is ready
body_preview: Your annual dividend and a members-only window on outdoor gear are available. Sign in to see your amount.

subject: Seattle Gophers: October talk - Building resilient Go services
body_preview: Doors at 6, talk at 6:30 in South Lake Union. This month: backoff, circuit breakers, and graceful shutdown in Go.

subject: Your wishlist is on sale this week
body_preview: Several games on your wishlist are discounted during the autumn sale. Offer ends Monday at 10am PT.

subject: Morning Brew: Markets cool, chips heat up
body_preview: Your Monday rundown on markets, big tech earnings, and the one chart everyone is sharing this week.

subject: Kubernetes Weekly #420: Gateway API GA and node autoscaling
body_preview: Gateway API hits GA, a walkthrough on cluster autoscaler tuning, and why you probably don't need a service mesh yet.

subject: Your daily Astronomy Picture of the Day
body_preview: Today's image: a wide-field view of the Veil Nebula captured over several nights. Full resolution and explanation inside.

subject: TLDR: AWS re:Invent dates, a Rust web framework, and a 9-line CSS trick
body_preview: Your daily byte-sized tech rundown: cloud, startups, and programming, all in five minutes.

subject: Steam Autumn Sale ends tomorrow
body_preview: Last chance: titles on your wishlist drop out of the sale at 10am PT tomorrow. Pick up Factorio before it's gone.

subject: Console Letter: How we cut our Postgres bill by 40%
body_preview: This week's open-source tools roundup plus a write-up on right-sizing managed Postgres for small teams.

subject: Your GitHub sponsors update and weekly digest
body_preview: Activity across repositories you follow, new releases from your starred projects, and trending Go repos this week.

subject: REI Co-op: Members-only gear event starts Friday
body_preview: Save on layers, boots, and trekking poles ahead of larch season. Free shipping for Co-op members.

subject: Bytes: The JavaScript newsletter that doesn't suck
body_preview: This issue: a new bundler benchmark, the state of signals, and a quiz that will humble you.

subject: Postgres Weekly #575: Logical replication deep dive
body_preview: Setting up logical replication for zero-downtime upgrades, plus a look at the new pg_stat improvements.

subject: Golang Weekly: Structured logging patterns with slog
body_preview: This week: practical slog patterns, a context-cancellation gotcha, and a fast new JSON library worth benchmarking.

subject: Seattle Go Meetup: November lightning talks - call for speakers
body_preview: We're booking five-minute lightning talks for November. Reply if you want a slot - homelab and side-project stories welcome.

body_preview: Your Monday rundown on markets, a closely watched cloud IPO, and the tech headlines everyone is talking about.
